title: M4Trust Warning
description: Non-fatal advisory information. Warning codes are intentionally open for forward compatibility; severity is a closed set without ERROR.

code.description: Stable warning code. Initial codes include LOW_TEXT_QUALITY, OCR_USED, PARTIAL_TEXT_EXTRACTION, LOW_CONFIDENCE_RESULT, INCOMPLETE_SOURCE_REFERENCE, VIDEO_VISIBILITY_GAP, and VIDEO_LOW_QUALITY.

message.description: Safe human-readable message; do not include secrets, raw stack traces, provider-native messages, or PII.

path.description: JSON Pointer-like path to the affected canonical field, when known.

details.description: Safe, bounded diagnostic details; no arbitrary key/value map is allowed.
